text: I recently switched my account to a new phone number, but now I'm locked out because I can't get the verification texts. What can I do?
I am unable to access my account due to a forgotten password. Could you assist with this issue?
I tried to reset my password but it’s still saying my email isn’t found? What’s going on? I thought I had made my account just a few weeks ago.
I received the wrong item, can I get a refund instead of waiting for a replacement?
I updated my profile info and now I'm not getting any of the alerts, it’s really frustrating because I need them for work! I’m not sure what else to do since I followed all the steps correctly.

So, I bought this thing and, like, it just doesn’t do what I thought it would. Got all hyped up from your ads, but now I'm left feeling like I wasted my cash on something that’s basically useless. Ugh, can’t believe this situation.

So, I've been trying to connect my smart fridge to the Wi-Fi for like hours, and it just keeps saying 'network error'. I even rebooted my router, which is kinda weird since my toaster is still online, right? Also, is it supposed to have a light show when it connects? I think I read that somewhere, but my fridge is just vibing there in the corner, totally unlit, if that makes any sense?
the app keeps crashing when i try 2 upload pic. not sure it's my phone or the app? tried restarting n still nothing.
I tried to update my profile info but now my notifications don't show up. Also, I think my last order is missing? What's going on?
i was wondering if u have any deals for students? like what’s up with that?

Hello support team, I hope you’re doing well! I have a rather specific question regarding the API—can you confirm if the search endpoint has any limits on the number of requests we can make within a certain timeframe? Also, just a side note, I was wondering if you guys plan to update the documentation anytime soon since it seems a bit outdated. Thanks in advance!
Is there a way to check my order status? Not sure if I missed something.

I can't help but express my frustration over the inconsistent service I've received. This is the third time I've encountered issues, and it's becoming quite unbearable. I really need someone to address this matter immediately.

I've been trying to log into my account for the past hour, but it keeps saying my password is incorrect. I know for sure that I'm entering the right one, but could you assist me in figuring out what might be going wrong here? I'm worried there's something off with my account since I also didn't get the confirmation email for my last transaction, which adds to my concern.
so, uh, is there like any way to get updates on the new features? would be nice to know, y'know?
I would like a refund for my recent purchase as the item was not as described. Can you please assist me with this matter?
